Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix PDF processing crash on Vercel: add DOMMatrix/Path2D/ImageData polyfills

pdfjs-dist v5 (used by pdf-parse v2) requires DOMMatrix, Path2D, and
ImageData which don't exist in Node.js serverless runtimes. The import
crash prevented the entire process route from loading, causing 405s.

Added minimal stubs since we only use pdf-parse for text extraction,
not rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix library not showing uploaded papers without page refresh

Root cause: LibraryPage uses its own local browsePapers state fetched via
loadBrowsePapers(), not the global state.papers. When refreshPapers() updated
global state after upload, the library's local state was never re-fetched.

Fix: Add global papers to the useEffect dependency array so loadBrowsePapers
re-triggers when refreshPapers updates state.papers. Also add a delayed second
refresh (1.5s) after batch_complete to catch papers still being committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix wholesale flag leak on retail ads + enforce ad context authority

- Fix ReferenceError: classificationFlowMap undefined in flowManager.js
- Stop scoring paths from writing isWholesaleInquiry to DB (only explicit
  handlers set it: wholesaleFlag middleware, intents.js, mallaFlow)
- Reset isWholesaleInquiry on new ad clicks (referral handler)
- Clear isWholesaleInquiry on stale conversation reset (12h)
- Skip detectExplicitProductSwitch when ad context exists — the ad
  dictates the flow, keyword heuristics only for organic conversations
- Wrap ad resolution/greeting in try-catch with fallback greeting

commit.message:
fix: convert favicon PNGs to 8-bit and add cache-busting

All favicon PNGs were 16-bit per channel (64-bit RGBA) which Safari
silently fails to render. Converted to standard 8-bit, regenerated
favicon.ico, and added ?v=2 query params to bust stale browser caches.

commit.message:
ST-009: Add SoundCloud as third preview source (#9)

Extend the Deezer→iTunes fallback chain with SoundCloud for underground
electronic music coverage.

Backend:
- New SoundCloud OAuth 2.1 Client Credentials service with circuit
  breaker (3 failures → 5min disable) and token caching (1hr - 60s)
- Resolve stream_url 302 redirect server-side to get direct CDN URL
  (proxy doesn't need OAuth token)
- 401 retry: invalidate cached token on auth failure, retry once
- Match scoring applied via shared is_acceptable_match()
- CDN whitelist: cf-preview-media.sndcdn.com, *.sndcdn.com

Frontend:
- SoundCloud source indicator (cloud icon, deep orange)
- "via SoundCloud · {uploaderName}" attribution with clickable backlink
- "via Apple Music" / "via Deezer" labels for consistency
- uploaderName field added to PreviewTrackInfo + PreviewSearchResult

Compliance: SC metadata not in LLM prompts, session-only caching,
attribution with uploader credit + backlink per API Terms.

Critic review: C1 (401 retry) and H1 (proxy auth) fixed.
360 backend + 150 frontend = 510 tests passing.

Co-authored-by: Steve Shapero <shaperosteve@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rebrand to Growth Equity Radar and fix local st.secrets crash

Replace all Mercato/Traverse branding with "Growth Equity Radar" across
the app, emails, digests, memos, and config. Wrap st.secrets.get() for
FROM_EMAIL in a try/except so the app no longer crashes locally without
a secrets.toml file.

Affected screens:
- MatchesScreen, MyTicketsScreen, RankingScreen

Expected improvements:

commit.message:
fix(sim): use paid OpenRouter model to avoid free-tier rate limits (#440) (#443)

The :free model suffix routes through shared free-tier capacity
regardless of API key, causing persistent 429s. Drop the suffix so the
API key's credits are used with dedicated rate limits.

Also log api_key_len at startup for easier debugging.

commit.message:
feat: implement all remaining NumPy ops across all backends

Adds comprehensive NumPy-parity ops to JS, WASM, and WebGPU backends:

DIFFERENCES: diff, gradient, ediff1d
CROSS PRODUCT: cross
STATISTICS: cov, corrcoef
CONVOLUTION: convolve, correlate
MATRIX CREATION: identity, tril, triu
GRID CREATION: meshgrid, logspace, geomspace
STACKING: vstack, hstack, dstack
SPLITTING: vsplit, hsplit, dsplit
REPLICATION: tile, repeat
INDEX FINDING: nonzero, argwhere, flatnonzero
VALUE HANDLING: nanToNum
SORTING: sort, argsort, searchsorted, unique

All 430 tests passing across both WASM and WebGPU backends.
Tests are parameterized - same test suite validates both backends.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix DateTimePicker on desktop browsers (Edge, Chrome) (#17)

The previous approach used an invisible overlay <input> which doesn't
work on desktop browsers — they require clicking the small calendar
icon within the input to open the picker, but with opacity:0 the icon
is invisible and unclickable.

Fix by rendering the <input type="datetime-local"> visibly on web,
styled to match the design system (no border, transparent background,
matching font). The browser's native date/time UI is now directly
interactive on all platforms: desktop Edge/Chrome, mobile Safari, etc.

Fixes #14

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: smoke test post-deploy intégré dans deploy script (#8)

- scripts/smoke_test_prod.py : suite 40 tests / 10 sections
  * Crée des clés éphémères sur OVH via SSH (contourne rate-limit free-signup)
  * delay=1.2s entre requêtes (nginx mcp_per_ip burst=10)
  * Champs corrects : certification_fee.method, arkforge_signature, transparency_log
  * Stamp via /trust/v/{id} (302) - pas /v1/proof/{id}/stamp
  * Exit 0=tout vert, 1=échecs, 2=erreur setup
  * Cleanup : désactive les clés test sur OVH à la fin

- scripts/deploy_trust_layer_prod.sh : phase OVH + smoke test
  * Flag --skip-smoke pour hotfixes urgents
  * Phase 2 : deploy SSH OVH (manquait — nginx route vers OVH primary)
  * Phase 2.5 : smoke test avec rollback auto sur les DEUX serveurs
  * Notification Telegram inclut résultat smoke (✓ / skipped)

Add Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA to contact form

to prevent spam submissions on the contact form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 30-iteration refinement — tests, multi-complexity, interactive mode

Direction 1 (iterations 1-10): Added 34 unit tests with mocked LLM calls
covering pipeline orchestration, complexity routing, JSON parsing, branch
boosting, web search, and full generate() flow. Registered pytest slow marker.

Direction 2 (iterations 11-20): Validated all 4 complexity tiers:
- arcade (1943): 7 systems, faithful to 1987 original
- casual (PvZ): 8 systems, lightweight progression
- mid-core (Hollow Knight): 9 systems, deep exploration
- hardcore (王者荣耀): 9 systems, 7.5k chars PRD
Fixed: core_systems checklist in conversation synthesis to reduce
false [INFERRED] tags. Bumped casual max_systems 5→6, mid-core 7→8.

Direction 3 (iterations 21-30): Added interactive/hybrid mode via
answer_fn callback parameter. When Clarify detects ambiguities:
- answer_fn=None → self-answer via LLM (existing behavior)
- answer_fn=callback → user answers interactively
Updated demo script with --interactive flag and 5 example games.

66 tests pass (34 new + 32 existing), 0 failures.

Add Misc section with Jake Frederick portfolio

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix voice stability: disable barge-in by default, add subprocess timeouts

Barge-in (mic monitoring during TTS) caused false interruptions from
speaker feedback and freezes from unresponsive subprocesses. Default
barge-in to off for reliable playback; opt-in via env var for headphone
users. Add 120s timeouts to all subprocess waits with kill fallback,
and SIGKILL escalation in ElevenLabs interrupt().

commit.message:
Fix test parallelism: batch pipelines in Level 3 tests, not autouse fixture

The autouse session fixture ran during Level 1 test setup (30s timeout),
causing all tests to error. Instead, batch-run all 5 discovery pipelines
concurrently on first Level 3 test call (600s timeout). Subsequent tests
hit the cache instantly.

Also fix _is_cloud_run() to detect CLOUD_RUN_JOB env var.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Skip Copilot SDK test jobs when COPILOT_GITHUB_TOKEN is unavailable

Dependabot PRs cannot access repository secrets, causing all 6 Copilot
SDK integration test jobs to fail on every Dependabot PR. This adds a
secret availability check in the params job and gates the 6 transform
jobs on the result, so they are cleanly skipped instead of failing.

feat: Phase 3.5 hardening — atomic costs, soft-delete budgets, validation improvements

CLI improvements:
- Atomic cost creation via fn_create_cost_with_items RPC (no orphan headers)
- Project budgets use soft-delete (is_active) instead of hard delete
- Exchange rate sanity check (2.5–6.0 PEN/USD range warning)
- Duplicate document_ref detection on cost import
- Sequential valuation number validation on import
- Quote total vs subtotal+IGV cross-check
- Payment selection shows project codes for easier identification
- list_choices() returns bool for empty-list guard pattern
- Loan schedule validates dates against loan date, captures exchange_rate

New migrations:
- 20260304000004: Add is_active to project_budgets with partial unique index
- 20260304000005: fn_create_cost_with_items atomic insert function
- 20260304000006: Add exchange_rate column to v_loan_balances
- 20260304000007: Fix v_ap_calendar loan payment tracking

View updates:
- v_ap_calendar: loan entries now track actual payments via loan_payments join
- v_loan_balances: includes exchange_rate for cross-currency P&L conversion
- v_bank_balances, v_budget_vs_actual: minor fixes

Website fixes:
- Cash flow, AR outstanding, financial position, prices: minor display fixes
- Updated database.types.ts, queries.ts, types.ts for new schema

commit.message:
Fix UX/UI issues: state bug, dedup constants, accessibility, search UX

- Fix resetView() not closing detail panel (left empty panel open)
- Extract shared ZOOM_THRESHOLDS to layoutEngine.ts, remove duplicates
  from TableNode and RelationshipLine
- Remove remaining duplicated BASE_TW/BASE_TH/SM constants in Canvas.tsx
- Fix DomainContainer relationship stats using OR instead of AND
  (inflated counts by including cross-domain relationships)
- Add keyboard focus indicator to DomainContainer toggle
- Data-model page: add search clear button, empty search state,
  truncate long table names, break-all on long field names,
  aria-expanded on layer toggles, aria-label on close button

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix strand handling, add R2 filtering and rRNA exclusion

- Fix reversed strand logic in step 03: for + strand R2 reads, the
  extracted genomic sequence matches Seq directly (no RC needed); for
  - strand R2 reads, RC is needed. Was previously backwards.
- Filter to R2-only reads in step 02: R1 positions mark the wrong end
  of the cDNA fragment and would give incorrect priming site locations.
- Add --exclude-bed option to step 04 for filtering off-target sites
  in rRNA or other repeat regions.
- Fix KeyError in step 05 caused by duplicate column names after merge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix story quality: null chapter guard + pronoun enforcement

- saveChapter() and autoSaveStory() now reject null/empty/progressive chapters
- Character gender/pronouns added to formatCharactersForContext() and formatCharacterIdentityLayer()
- System prompt now has explicit pronoun consistency rule
- AI character extraction schema includes sex field (replaces random assignment)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: handle HEAD /mcp and correct WWW-Authenticate format for Gemini CLI

Gemini CLI sends HEAD /mcp first to discover auth — we were returning
404 (no HEAD handler), preventing OAuth discovery entirely.

WWW-Authenticate format corrected to use resource_metadata parameter
(RFC 9728) which Gemini CLI's oauth-utils.ts specifically parses:
  Bearer resource_metadata="{base}/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource"

commit.message:
fix: Default file browser to /content/ on Colab

os.path.expanduser('~') returns /root/ on Colab, which is empty.
Colab files and mounted Drive are under /content/.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: end-to-end frontend auth, websocket, and message rendering

- jwt.strategy: skip audience check when not configured (Keycloak
  does not set aud claim by default for public SPA clients)
- app.config: change JWT audience default from 'account' to empty
- realtime.gateway: decode JWT payload to extract sub claim for
  socket auth instead of using raw token as keycloakId
- AuthContext: prevent double Keycloak.init from React StrictMode
  using useRef guard
- useSocket: connect directly to API host, limit reconnection
  attempts, memoize channel functions with useCallback
- useMessages: fix response parsing — API returns array in data
  field, not nested items object
- keycloak-realm: set temporary:false so login doesn't require
  immediate password change (which caused redirect loop)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
